name: HOGE streaming 1024-point NTT wrapper
description: Forward streaming NTT wrapper emitted by the HOGE streaming extraction. The current repository does not yet define a TFHEpp correctness test for this wrapper, so the benchmark treats it as an interface/lint task.

reference.intended_operation: cuHEpp forward twist NTT over P, but no executable test is currently included

observable_contract.lint: Verilog must elaborate with module NTTWrap and the listed ports.
observable_contract.ready: io_ready should be high when an input cycle is accepted

secondary: add a future executable reference test before comparing performance
